calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing: Petition For Pre-Litigation Discovery To Preserve Evidence
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Aseem Gupta's unopposed Petition For Pre-Litigation Discovery To Preserve Evidence is GRANTED.

Given the Joint Stipulation Re; Prelitigation Discovery, filed December 26, 2025, the court orders CBRE to preserve and produce to Petitioner Aseem Gupta the requested video surveillance footage from 500 Howard Street on June 10, 2025, between 12:00 and 1:30 pm. Production to be made within 20 days of notice of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
